task_completion.description: Verify the parent product's basic information (Name, SKU, Price, Weight, Category) is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Magento product creation/edit page. The 'Product Name' field should be 'Trailmaster Summit Backpack 45L', 'SKU' should be 'TMS-BP-45L', 'Price' should be '149.99', 'Weight' should be '2.5', and 'Sports' should be selected in the 'Categories' field.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Color' is selected as the configurable attribute.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Create Product Configurations' modal or the 'Configurations' section on the product page. The attribute 'Color' should be checked or listed as the configuring attribute.

task_completion.description: Verify the Black child variant is created with the correct SKU, Price, and Quantity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the configuration steps or the generated configurations grid at the bottom of the product page, look for the Black variant row. It must show SKU 'TMS-BP-45L-BLK', Price '149.99', and Quantity '30'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Green child variant is created with the correct SKU, Price, and Quantity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the configuration steps or the generated configurations grid at the bottom of the product page, look for the Green variant row. It must show SKU 'TMS-BP-45L-GRN', Price '159.99', and Quantity '25'.

task_completion.description: Verify the product is Enabled, In Stock, and has Catalog+Search visibility.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Enable Product' toggle switched to ON (usually green/blue), 'Stock Status' set to 'In Stock', and 'Visibility' set to 'Catalog, Search' on the product edit page.

task_completion.description: Verify the configurable product was successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a green success message banner stating 'You saved the product.' at the top of the Magento admin panel, or the product appearing in the 'Catalog > Products' grid with the type 'Configurable Product'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Magento web interface to create the product.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Magento Admin panel, filling out forms, and clicking buttons, rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a database client or terminal to insert the product directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of MySQL command line, phpMyAdmin, or terminal scripts executing SQL queries to bypass the Magento UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually typed or pasted the values into the Magento forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show intermediate steps of the form being filled out, dropdowns being clicked, and the configuration wizard being stepped through.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Parent Product: Name 'Trailmaster Summit Backpack 45L', SKU 'TMS-BP-45L', Price $149.99, Type 'configurable', Category 'Sports'. Configurable Attribute: 'Color'. Child Product 1 (Black): SKU 'TMS-BP-45L-BLK', Price $149.99, Qty 30. Child Product 2 (Green): SKU 'TMS-BP-45L-GRN', Price $159.99, Qty 25. Note the intentional price difference for the Green variant ($159.99 vs parent/black $149.99).
